I can help you create a task! Please provide the details or click here to open the Create Task page directly.

I'd love to help you schedule that! To create a task or meeting, please visit the Task Creation page where you can set the title, date, and priority. Alternatively, visit the Task Planner to see all your goals.

action_responses.meeting:
I can help you schedule a meeting! Please provide:
• Meeting title
• Date and time (e.g., tomorrow 9am)
• Participants (if any)
• Location or meeting link

I'll create a task for you in the system!
action_responses.reminder: I'll set up a reminder for you! What should I remind you about and when?
action_responses.appointment:
Let me help you book that appointment! I need:
• What is the appointment for?
• When (date and time)?
• Where or with whom?

I'll add it to your tasks!
